name: Rocket Companies, Inc.
business: Rocket Companies is a Detroit-based fintech company offering mortgage, real estate, and personal finance services through an AI-powered, vertically integrated homeownership ecosystem. Its flagship Rocket Mortgage is the nation's largest mortgage originator by loan units and largest mortgage servicer. The company also provides title and closing services via Rocket Close, personal finance through Rocket Money, and personal loans via Rocket Loans.

exposures.sentence: We are a Detroit based fintech company including mortgage, real estate and personal finance businesses with a mission to Help Everyone Home.
Our full suite of products empowers our clients across home search, mortgage finance and servicing, title and closing, financial wellness and personal loans.
Cyberattacks, security breaches, or a failure to comply with information security laws or regulations could result in serious harm to our reputation and adversely affect our business.
We believe AI will transform our business, and in turn, the client experience and the industry, from lead generation and allocation to underwriting, closing and servicing.

catalysts.sentence: On June 30, 2025, we completed the Up-C Collapse to simplify our organizational and capital structure.
On July 1, 2025, we completed our all-stock acquisition of Redfin.
On October 1, 2025, we completed our previously announced all-stock acquisition of Mr. Cooper.
Effective February 10, 2025, Amrock, LLC amended its name to Rocket Close, LLC.

tamClaims.claim: Overall US mortgage origination volume was $1.9 trillion in 2025, up 15% from $1.7 trillion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, the housing and mortgage origination markets continued to show growth and recovery over 2024, with overall mortgage origination volume increasing 15% from $1.7 trillion in 2024 to $1.9 trillion in 2025.
